description: Deed of sale in Arabic script. Dated: 22 Rabīʿ II 717 AH = 4 July 1317 CE. Buyer: Isḥāq b. Manṣūr b. Abū Sahl the Rabbanite Jew. The property is located on Darb Ṭirāz al-Dawla. There are at least 8 additional entries in different hands including concerning subsequent sales, one dated 750 AH = 1349 CE. Already at the time of the first sale the upper story was in ruins and the staircase removed. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
